Lessons

Choose the ride that fits your level.

Start from zero, progress through a focused package, or tune advanced technique with a session built around your goals.

Beginner

Baptism of the Sea

Learn kite control, safety basics, wind window, and first water movements with a calm step-by-step approach.

2 hoursfrom €60

A complete path for building independence, water starts, board control, and confident riding in real conditions.

Tailored For You

Targeted coaching for transitions, upwind riding, jumps, confidence, or a smooth return after a long break.

Flexiblefrom €100

The spot

Flat water, thermal wind, Sardinian light.

Our teaching area is selected for forgiving water, clear wind direction, and easy progression. Every session is planned around the day's conditions, your level, and the safest learning window.

  • Reliable summer thermal winds
  • Beginner-friendly water conditions
  • Safety briefing and radio support

About

Serious coaching, relaxed island energy.

Kite Away Sardinia combines certified instruction with local knowledge and a warm, practical approach. You get clear feedback, quality equipment, and the space to learn without pressure.

What is included

Board, kite, harness, helmet, impact vest, safety systems, spot briefing, and lesson planning around the wind forecast.

Gallery

A visual feel for the day.

FAQ

Good to know before you ride.

What if I have no experience?

No problem. Beginner lessons start with safety, kite control, and simple water exercises before progressing to the board.

Is equipment included?

Yes. Kite, board, harness, helmet, impact vest, and safety gear are included in every lesson.

What happens if there is no wind?

We reschedule around safe and useful wind conditions. The goal is a good lesson, not forcing a bad one.

Contact

Ready to plan your session?

Send a message with your dates, level, and group size. We will suggest the best lesson format and wind window.

WhatsAppEmail us
